task: Build a Python script that trains a KMeans clustering model on the iris dataset, prints cluster centers and inertia

files.description: Trains a KMeans clustering model on the iris dataset, then prints cluster centers and inertia.
Trains a KMeans clustering model on the iris dataset, then prints cluster centers and inertia.

generated_files.main.py:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans

def main():
    iris = load_iris()
    data = pd.DataFrame(data=iris.data, columns=iris.feature_names)

    kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)
    kmeans.fit(data)

    print("Cluster Centers:\n", kmeans.cluster_centers_)
    print("Inertia:", kmeans.inertia_)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

plan_md:
# Iris KMeans Clustering

## Description
A Python script to train and evaluate a KMeans clustering model on the iris dataset.

## Architecture
Single-file script to load data, train a KMeans model, and output cluster centers and inertia.

## Tech Stack
Python, scikit-learn, pandas, numpy

## Files
- main.py — Trains a KMeans clustering model on the iris dataset, then prints cluster centers and inertia.

## Entry Point
main.py
